name: dikon
description: A tiny copy-file dependency injection helper for TypeScript.
author: Artem Baranov <temoncher@yandex.ru>

scripts.format: oxfmt --write package.json tsconfig.json README.md dikon.ts dikon.test.ts dikon.test-d.ts dikon.perf.test-d.ts oxfmt.config.ts oxlint.config.ts vitest.config.ts && oxfmt --write examples/react-simple/package.json examples/react-simple/tsconfig.json examples/react-simple/oxfmt.config.ts examples/react-simple/oxlint.config.ts examples/react-simple/vite.config.ts examples/react-simple/vitest.config.ts examples/react-simple/src && oxfmt --write examples/react-complex/package.json examples/react-complex/tsconfig.json examples/react-complex/oxfmt.config.ts examples/react-complex/oxlint.config.ts examples/react-complex/vite.config.ts examples/react-complex/vitest.config.ts examples/react-complex/vitest.browser.config.ts examples/react-complex/src examples/react-complex/.storybook
